messages.content:
Which of the following is not the responsibility of the chief financial officer (CFO) in an organization’s sustainability measurement activities?


Aligning non-financial aspects of performance with the financial corporate strategy

Building innovative business cases to demonstrate the value of sustainability

Measuring only the financial growth of the organization
Measuring only the financial growth of the organization

Under the Non-Financial Reporting Directive (NFRD) from the European Union (EU), what are large public-interest companies required to disclose?


Reveal how they operate and address social and environmental challenges.

Reveal the financial data of their operations in Europe.

Disclose the steps they take to upskill their employees on ethics and compliance issues.
Reveal how they operate and address social and environmental challenges.

What does the “economy of care” focus on?


The increasing rate of population growth and the subsequent need for greater resources

The importance of qualitative key performance indicators (KPIs)

The business strategies adopted by various companies to upskill employees
The importance of qualitative key performance indicators (KPIs)

Which of the following is a European Union (EU)-wide classification system for sustainable activities?


EU Taxonomy

Green New Deal

Paris Agreement
EU Taxonomy

Which of the following is not a consequence for businesses that fail to integrate sustainability measurement in their operations?


They could be penalized in terms of poor environmental, social, and governance (ESG) goals.

They may lose out on critical growth opportunities.

They will be able to respond to market changes in a more agile manner.
They will be able to respond to market changes in a more agile manner.

Budget updates, revising planning for specific business units, and establishing incentives for achieving sustainability goals are examples of actions for which key area of sustainability performance measurement?


Analyze

Adapt

Identify

Aggregate
Adapt

Which measuring technique is useful in benchmarking a company’s environmental, social, and governance (ESG) reporting with the leading frameworks on sustainability and ESG disclosures and reporting?


Sustainability Gap analysis

Materiality score

Crisis management communication plan

Sustainability roadmap
Sustainability Gap analysis

How can artificial intelligence (AI), big data, machine learning (ML), and data analytics facilitate better and faster business decisions?


By enabling better coverage and integration of financial data

By providing companies with mature data and enhanced reporting capabilities

By filtering out non-verifiable data that can disrupt the decision-making process
By providing companies with mature data and enhanced reporting capabilities

Onboarding and training middle management on new reporting processes and key performance indicators (KPIs) is a core component of a company’s _______.


change management strategy

operating model

sustainability framework

governance framework
change management strategy

_______ is Accenture’s custom-built, comprehensive, and transparent cloud platform that offers quick access to reliable and environmental, social, and governance (ESG)-pertinent data lake solutions.


CFO ESG Maturity Matrix

ESG 360

Sustainability performance measurement (SPM) solution
ESG 360

Accenture’s 360° Value framework is designed to help clients _______.


improve business performance with the development of new products and services

rapidly accelerate their digital transformation

transform and reinvent their businesses, reskill their employees, and become more sustainable
transform and reinvent their businesses, reskill their employees, and become more sustainable

A pharmaceutical firm wants to transition to sustainable technologies. As part of this goal, they want to move their applications from enterprise-owned servers to the cloud. What sustainable benefit will they achieve by this migration?


Greater access to finance

Reduced server maintenance effort

Reduced carbon emissions
Reduced carbon emissions

Fill in the blanks: Improved accessibility to data and information, _____________, and greater circularity of hardware and servers are desired customer outcomes of combining sustainable cloud, IT, and software.


improved products or services

increased customer touchpoints

responsible management of data and applications
responsible management of data and applications

Which of the following is not a key dimension of 360 Value that companies should focus on to achieve their sustainability goals?


Talent

Operational efficiency

Financial

Diversity & Inclusion
Operational efficiency

Which of the following is not a benefit of using sustainable technologies?


Increased transparency of supply chains

Reduced operational IT footprint

Greater virtual collaboration

Reduced cost of operations
Increased transparency of supply chains

Which of the following is an example of a societal benefit of using sustainable technologies?


Reuse of devices using the sharing platform model

Increased transparency in supply chains

Use of renewable technologies in operations
Reuse of devices using the sharing platform model
